text:
27 AUGUST 1959

I. THE COMMUNIST BLOC
Chinese Communist party leaders readjust economic targets downward, but maintain "leap forward" pressure.
Soviet Navy concludes large-scale combined air/surface/submarine exercise
token_text: 27 august 1959 i the communist bloc chinese communist party leaders readjust economic targets downward but maintain leap forward pressure soviet navy concludes large-scale combined air surface submarine exercise

text:
Norwegian Sea.
USSR concludes $35,000,000 aid agreement with Guinea.

II. ASIA-AFRICA
Laos--Guerrilla action now largely limited to northern provinces, but Communists possibly preparing for country-wide operations
India will not interfere with any appeal by Dalai Lama for UN action on Tibet.

III. THE WEST
Prominent West Germans press Adenauer to make gesture aimed at easing way for ultimate resumption of relations with Poland.
De Gaulle reportedly seeking Algerian solution involving membership in French Community
